name: CreateAnnotationRequest
description: CreateAnnotationRequest schema from Amplitude Chart Annotations API

label.description: The display label for the annotation.

date.description: The date of the annotation in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date for date-range annotations in YYYY-MM-DD format.

details.description: Additional details or notes for the annotation.

category.description: The category to assign to the annotation.

chart_id.description: The ID of the chart to associate the annotation with. Omit for project-wide annotations.
